'''fadhudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanobacterium|cyanobacterium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanobacterium|cyanobacterium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fadhudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fædhidith|fædhidith]] || [[word:fædhidij|fædhidij]] || [[word:fædhidish|fædhidish]] || [[word:fædhidi|fædhidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadhudhuduth|fadhudhuduth]] || [[word:fadhudhuduj|fadhudhuduj]] || [[word:fadhudhudush|fadhudhudush]] || [[word:fadhudhudu|fadhudhudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadhuduth|fadhuduth]] || [[word:fadhuduj|fadhuduj]] || [[word:fadhudush|fadhudush]] || [[word:fadhudu|fadhudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadhufduth|fadhufduth]] || [[word:fadhufduj|fadhufduj]] || [[word:fadhufdush|fadhufdush]] || [[word:fadhufduf|fadhufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fadhuduthu|fadhuduthu]] || [[word:fadhuduju|fadhuduju]] || [[word:fadhudushu|fadhudushu]] || [[word:fadhuduku|fadhuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fadhuduth|fadhuduth]] || [[word:fadhuduj|fadhuduj]] || [[word:fadhudush|fadhudush]] || [[word:fadhudu|fadhudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fadhuduthul|fadhuduthul]] || [[word:fadhudujul|fadhudujul]] || [[word:fadhudushul|fadhudushul]] || [[word:fadhudukul|fadhudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fadhuduthuthu|fadhuduthuthu]] || [[word:fadhudujuju|fadhudujuju]] || [[word:fadhudushushu|fadhudushushu]] || [[word:fadhuduku|fadhuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fadhuduthun|fadhuduthun]] || [[word:fadhudujun|fadhudujun]] || [[word:fadhudushun|fadhudushun]] || [[word:fadhudukun|fadhudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fadhuduthuoro|fadhuduthuoro]] || [[word:fadhudujuoro|fadhudujuoro]] || [[word:fadhudushuoro|fadhudushuoro]] || [[word:fadhudukuoro|fadhudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
